title: odontarrhena masmenaea
intro: Odontarrhena masmenaea, also known as Toothache Root, is a plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae, native to Australia and Tasmania. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health issues, including toothaches, pain, and inflammation. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing pain and swelling, and is also used to treat respiratory problems, digestive issues, and fever. Traditionally, Odontarrhena masmenaea is prepared as a tincture, infusion, or powder for use in herbal remedies.
